# Debmallya Bhattacharya

## Senior Software Development Engineer

Experienced software engineer with a penchant for modern UI architecture. 8+ years of industry experience include researching and developing high-performance products using best-in-class developer tools. Strong skills include UI architecture using JavaScript, Typescript, and CSS.

# **AREAS OF EXPERTISE**

Product ownership, Project architecture, Front-end development, Scrum and Agile methodologies

# **WORK EXPERIENCE**

## **Senior Software Development Engineer**

### Workday [🌐](https://www.workday.com/)

#### *Dec 2022 \- Present, Dublin (Ireland)*

* \<Ongoing\>

## **Angular Developer**

### Blueface, A Comcast Business Company [🌐](https://www.blueface.com/)

#### *Aug 2020 \- Oct 2022, Dublin (Ireland)*

* Blueface has a white-label & permission-based B2C portal for providing UCaaS for customers like [Comcast](https://corporate.comcast.com/), [Three](https://www.three.ie/), and [Panasonic](https://www.panasonic.com/global/home.html), to name a few. My responsibilities included:  
  * Leading project Palantir \- an integrated Video Conferencing software similar to Google Meet  
  * Creating modules like Account, Contacts, etc, and contributing to others  
  * Bringing modern tools to the mix, like [Nx](https://nx.dev/),  [jasmine-auto-spies](https://www.npmjs.com/package/jasmine-auto-spies), and Typescript [utilities](https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/handbook/utility-types.html) & [narrowing](https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/handbook/2/narrowing.html)   
* Tech \- Angular 12, Typescript, NGXS, WebRTC, WebSockets, FreeSwitch, Janus, Docker, Atlassian suite

## **Associate Consultant**

### Atos Syntel [🌐](https://atos.net/en/)

#### *Aug 2018 \- Feb 2020, Kolkata (India)*

* Worked for Willis Towers Watson (WTW) as a contractor throughout my tenure at Atos Syntel.  
* WTW has an insurance portal where customers can maintain health insurance and claim reimbursement by uploading receipts. My responsibilities included:  
  * Developing the Help Ticket module, where customer tickets are created, tracked, and responded to  
  * Creating a reusable filter (for lists) that can be configured on the fly  
  * Solving efficiency issues by setting best practices such as OnPush CD, smaller components, etc  
* Tech \- Angular 8, NgBootstrap, SASS, Jasmine/Karma, Protractor, Atlassian suite

## **Systems Engineer**

### Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) [🌐](https://www.tcs.com/)

#### *Aug 2014 \- Jul 2018, Mumbai (India)*

* TCS maintained and upgraded the Citibank Concierge project. My responsibilities included:  
  * Helping rewrite parts of the project in Angular  
  * Adding new features and bug fixes to the Source of Wealth module  
  * Designing and implementing a brand new automation tool for faster document generation  
* Tech \- Angular 2, HTML5, CSS3, Atlassian suite, Microsoft Office suite

# **TECHNICAL SKILLS**

Javascript, HTML, CSS, TypeScript, SASS, RxJS, Redux, Angular, NGXS, NgRx, Angular CDK, Angular PWA, AngularFire, Firebase, Jasmine, Karma, Protractor, Cypress, React, Redux-toolkit, React hooks, React hook form, UI Libraries, Nx, Bash, GitHub, Bitbucket, Atlassian Jira, Angular Devtools, Redux Devtools, Docker, WebRTC, WebSockets, Linux, macOS, Windows

# **COURSES AND TRAININGS**

## **Angular Architecture Workshop, Advanced** [🌐](https://www.angulararchitects.io/en/dates/angular-architecture-online-workshop-advanced-english-nov-2020/)[📃](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1UPz_UPPZVuwLBuPTgi6MWKoN51CD0Otw/view)

### Angular Architects

#### *Aug 2021, Dublin (Ireland)*

* This course taught architecture and maintenance of large-scale apps with the help of several tools available in Nx, with advanced concepts in Dependency Injection, custom libraries, RxJS, performance, etc  
* Tech \- Angular 13, Monorepos using Nx, Architecture tools in Nx, NgRx, Performance tuning, etc

# **VOLUNTEER EXPERIENCE**

## **Google Developers Group** [🌐](https://gdg.community.dev/gdg-kolkata/)

#### *2019 \- 2020, Kolkata (India)*

* Delivered seminars on Angular, Firebase, and modern web standards  
* Created the Devfest Kolkata 2019 site, which reached the top spot in Google Search in July '19
